vocab.meaning: chiêm ngưỡng với sự kinh ngạc/ngưỡng mộ
vocab.example: I often stop to marvel at the intricate stonework of old cathedrals before taking a few snapshots.

vocab.meaning: phóng to vào một chi tiết cụ thể
vocab.example: I like to zoom in on the ornate gargoyles or unique window frames to capture details that most people miss.

vocab.meaning: nổi bật trên nền của cái gì đó
vocab.example: Modern glass skyscrapers really stand out against a clear blue sky, making for a perfect photographic composition.
While wandering through the old quarter, I occasionally stumble upon hidden architectural gems that are incredibly photogenic.

vocab.meaning: thử nghiệm nhiều cách khác nhau
vocab.example: I enjoy playing around with different angles and lighting to give a mundane building a more dramatic look.

vocab.meaning: hòa hợp với môi trường xung quanh
vocab.example: I love capturing how contemporary structures manage to blend in with their historical surroundings.

vocab.meaning: làm nổi bật vẻ đẹp của cái gì đó
vocab.example: The golden hour sunlight really sets off the red brickwork of the colonial buildings in my city.

vocab.meaning: ngước nhìn lên (nghĩa đen trong nhiếp ảnh kiến trúc)
vocab.example: Sometimes I just look up to the tip of a skyscraper to find a dizzying perspective for my next shot.

vocab.meaning: theo dõi/cập nhật (xu hướng kiến trúc mới)
vocab.example: I try to keep up with the latest urban developments so I can be the first to photograph new landmarks.
Every time I pass by the opera house, I can't resist the urge to take another photo of its iconic roof.
